articles.author: The Associated Press
articles.title: Central Europe sizzles as heat records are smashed in Switzerland, Denmark and Czech Republic - NBC News
articles.description: Temperatures soared to record highs from Switzerland to the Czech Republic and Denmark on Saturday, as a heat wave that baked western European countries this week moved to central and eastern parts of the continent.
